title: erigeron stellatus
intro: Erigeron stellatus, also known as daisy fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Erigeron stellatus has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and diuretic properties, which can help to relieve congestion and promote urination. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal benefits.
